changes: Added [&.scrolling]:mt-0 to .header-main class list after mt-8, so margin is removed when header becomes fixed on scroll
Added [&.scrolling]:mt-0 to .header-main className cn() entry after mt-8, keeping TSX in sync with PHP

Scroll handler (line 173): Added const headerMarginTop = parseInt(window.getComputedStyle(header).marginTop, 10) || 0 before showSpacer call; updated showSpacer(header.offsetHeight) to showSpacer(header.offsetHeight + headerMarginTop). Margin is read before header.classList.add('scrolling') so [&.scrolling]:mt-0 has not yet zeroed it.

openMenu handler (line 297): Added const headerMarginTopOpen = parseInt(window.getComputedStyle(header).marginTop, 10) || 0 before header.classList.add('scrolling', 'scrolling-up') so margin is captured before it is zeroed; updated showSpacer(header.offsetHeight) to showSpacer(header.offsetHeight + headerMarginTopOpen).

syncStatus.notes: Pre-existing structure difference warning at depth 1 is unrelated to this change.

fixesApplied.description: Added [&.scrolling]:mt-0 to .header-main in HeaderMain.php — removes mt-8 margin when header is fixed, preventing doubled gap on top.
Added [&.scrolling]:mt-0 to .header-main in HeaderMain.tsx — keeps editor component in sync with PHP.

Updated both showSpacer() calls in HeaderMain.js to include computed marginTop in the height calculation so the spacer fully compensates for the space the header occupied in normal flow (offsetHeight + marginTop). Margin is always read before .scrolling is added to ensure [&.scrolling]:mt-0 has not yet zeroed it.
